Jeff Duncan-Andrade, founder and board chair of the Roses in Concrete Community School, made the case that equity is everyone's responsibility during his keynote at Carnegie's 2017 Summit on Improvement in Education.
If we have academic rigor without social justice, then we have neither. There is no academic rigor without social justice. Stay focused on the people who need it most and who have it the least.

This Is Hell! | A government against itself: The state of radical democracy in Venezuela.
A government against itself: The state of radical democracy in Venezuela.
Chavez gives this speech in late 2012 where he's berating his government ministers - it's his last major speech - and part of what he's trying to do is lay out his legacy, and to make it clear what he stands for. And in that speech it becomes perfectly clear he stands for the commune, and the development of an alternative form of production and radical democracy that stands against the existing state.
Political theorist George Ciccariello-Maher explores the political and economic history of the Venezuelan commune, from its pre-Chavez roots in a popular uprising against the neoliberal order, to the challenges of sustaining direct democracy and socialist principles in the face of vast demographic changes, oil market fluctuations and capitalist resistance.
George Ciccariello-Maher is an author and Associate Professor of Politics and Global Studies at Drexel University in Philadelphia.

Flyboard of Zapata Racing is the new water sport which taking over the world. Now you can easily take part in it here in Nha Trang, Vietnam. It is easy: you don't have to be an athlete. Using the Flyboard is quite similar to riding a self-balancing scooter. Our instructors will brief and lead you with expertize, so it will take only two to five minutes to get the basics and start to fly confidently or even perform some basic stunts.

May 5, 2017 - There will soon be another quarterback entering the broadcast booth with the news that Fox Sports has hired Jay Cutler as an NFL game analyst. The move comes in the wake of CBS naming Tony Romo as their top analyst, with Phil Simms heading to "The NFL Today" studio show.
Cutler, an 11-year veteran with the Denver Broncos and Chicago Bears, will be part of the No. 2 broadcast team in a three-man booth alongside play-by-announcer Kevin Burkhardt and analyst Charles Davis. This will allow the 34-year-old to get his feet wet the same way that Troy Aikman did when he entered broadcasting in 2002, working with Joe Buck and Cris Collinsworth.
Cutler, who holds almost every passing record in Bears franchise history, was released by the team in March. He was in discussions with several teams, including the New York Jets, but opted to join Fox. However, the former All-Pro has not ruled out the idea of playing again.
"I don't know if retirement is the right word; I don't feel that anyone ever really retires from the NFL," Cutler said. "You are either forced to leave, or you lose the desire to do what's required to keep going. I'm in between those situations at this point in my life."
It's unclear if Cutler was given a clause in his contract that would allow him to return to the field. But if he was, the three-man booth would also serve as a safety net for Fox if a mid-season QB injury forces a team to come calling for his services.

SECURITY MANAGEMENT software and door control hardware are your business's first line of defense when it comes to loss prevention. Starr Telecom offers the Infinias access control system, which makes access control easy. Simply install one controller locally at each door and connect it to the nearest Power over Ethernet switch with a single Cat-5/6 cable.
Add doors anywhere your network goes, making it easy and cost effective to build a system one door at a time. Combine the door controller with our access management software to create a highly scalable solution that can be deployed within one building, or across multiple locations around the world.

The Shedim are not afraid of us.
There is no power short of Adonai which can hold them.
The Utukku are safe behind the veil.
Their Kings celebrate our suffering in the hidden lands.
The Rabisu know they can feed upon us and live forever.
The Jinn know their power and revel in it.
dusty rocks? The littlest sound, it is. Like a tinkle of a bell.
convey more fear in our hearts?
The Shedim are made of smoke and fire and their world is the same.
millennia we fought our primitive fights. Even now we barely live.
invisible places where we cannot see.
and only then, will the joke finally end.
years in the dirt. I could tell you of children who followed.
share the anguish and outrage that plagued my soul, but no.
Share my laughter instead. It is not bitter. It hides no malice.
laughter can. Hawwa will speak the word soon, and... you'll see!
heart will fill your throats and you too will be Sara, then.
stars. Laugh at the dogs in their costumes. Hah!
phrases were memorized and repeated as we do with scripture today.

We provide a number of outdoor stages or hire services. Covered in stages are essential if your event is outside, given the weather we have! We can meet you at the location the stage is to go and we can assess the site, discuss your needs and find a solution that works for you. Our outdoor stage can come with audio and lighting or you can supply your own. We also offer crowd safety barriers (also known as mojo barriers).
We supply our trailer stage options all over the country for many types of events. We have 2 sizes to choose from depending on your budget and the nature of your event. Performance area is 8m x 6.5m, and for bigger events you can add on the extended PA wings giving you a 12m stage frontage. These are ideal for larger events and ideal for branding. We can also offer drum kit and keyboard risers with all our stages. If you are a performer or band who likes to interact with their audience, we can provide a ramp going into the crowd. Just ask for details.
We have a wide range of outdoor stage hire & crowd control solutions available. However, with every turnkey product and as every event hire is different, sometimes flexible staging solutions are required. Our stage platforms give you complete flexibility in your choice of stage size and height. Choose an open air or a covered option, single level or tiered option with wheelchair ramps. Stage & Lighting can build your outdoor stage design!
27m2 stage area with various height ground support. The newest edition to the family! This provides the ideal solution for various applications. Ideal for small street concerts where set up time is restricted, street festivals, community events and as a VIP viewing platform.

Major life transitions can be stressful, scary, or devastating.
Have you experienced one of these major life transitions?
These life transitions are the difficult realities of life — change is inevitable and major changes like these rock our world, emotionally and psychologically. We work hard to achieve success, stability, and security. Just when we think we've arrived, that things are going well and we have some balance in life, a major life transition can result in emotional turmoil and mental confusion.
Life transitions can be very challenging, and they're often an opportunity for personal growth and development.
Change and major life transitions are inevitable. Our counseling and therapy staff specialize in supporting and guiding people through these difficult and challenging experiences.

Since 1916, our club has been advocating for the preservation and enjoyment of the Great Outdoors. From the inception of the Appalachian Trail, we have helped to build and maintain our 65-mile section of the AT and its cabins, shelters, monuments, and rest stops between Pennsylvania's Lehigh and Susquehanna Rivers.
Become a Steward of the great Appalachian Trail ... AND HAVE FUN!
Join BMECC to hike with us, help with our conservation mission and special projects, and meet interesting, like-minded people like you!
We lead club hikes on the Appalachian Trail and locations in Pennsylvania's beautiful Berks and Lehigh Counties ... and beyond. We also schedule bike rides, cultural events, educational programs, camping trips, lunches & dinners, and all sorts of outdoor activities. Check the schedule to see how much fun we can pack into a month!
We are very proud of our role as a builder and caretaker of the Appalachian Trail. We hold frequent work trips on our section of the AT, which includes seven shelters, club monuments, and numerous vistas. Join us to help preserve this amazing American treasure.
Stories, anecdotes, and photos from our members' experiences in the Great Outdoors!
The club owns and maintains the Rentschler Arboretum, a beautiful, 34-acre tract of land and Kalbach Pavilion, in the foothills of the Blue Mountains near Bernville, PA. Monthly club meetings are held here. Everyone is invited!
